title: Krauze takes Saeima seat again, pushes Zemmers out
summary_full: Didzis Zemmers will lose his seat in the Saeima, as the former Minister of Agriculture, Armands Krauze (Union of Greens and Farmers), whom the prime minister dismissed from office on Thursday, May 14, returns to parliament, the ZZS confirmed to the LETA news agency.
